metadata.designationRound: 2018 designation under the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act of 2017 (26 U.S.C. 1400Z-1)
metadata.source: CDFI Fund / HUD Opportunity Zones — ArcGIS FeatureServer/13
metadata.bundledScope: Central Texas wedge (Travis, Bastrop, Williamson, Hays, Caldwell, Comal, Guadalupe, Bexar, Bell, Milam counties)
metadata.bundledScopeReason: Bundled git fixture is the CI/dev fallback only. Production hydrates the full national set from GCS on boot (BROKERAGE_FEDERAL_DATA_GCS_PREFIX). Full-national geometry is ~157MB, unsuitable for git; the Central TX wedge (real authoritative geometry, 5-decimal precision ~1m) covers the map product's active coverage area.
metadata.note: Real CDFI/HUD-designated OZ tracts. Not synthetic. Replaces the prior single-feature synthetic sample.
